baseUri.title: base_uri
baseUri.description: Optionally specify a base uri of the login UI. If unspecified the default URI will be used.

zitadel.idp.v1.IDPOwnerType.title: IDPOwnerType
zitadel.idp.v1.IDPOwnerType.description: the owner of the identity provider.

zitadel.idp.v1.IDPType.title: IDPType
zitadel.idp.v1.IDPType.description: authorization framework of the identity provider

hideLoginNameSuffix.title: hide_login_name_suffix
hideLoginNameSuffix.description: hides the org suffix on the login form if the scope \"urn:zitadel:iam:org:domain:primary:{domainname}\" is set

allowDomainDiscovery.title: allow_domain_discovery
allowDomainDiscovery.description: If set to true, the suffix (@domain.com) of an unknown username input on the login screen will be matched against the org domains and will redirect to the registration of that organization on success.

userId.title: user_id
userId.description: optionally set your own id unique for the user.

zitadel.management.v1.ImportHumanUserReq.title: ImportHumanUserRequest
zitadel.management.v1.ImportHumanUserReq.description: Describe my Import Human User Request

linkingUserPromptText.title: linking_user_prompt_text
linkingUserPromptText.description: Deprecated: the linking user prompt screen no longer exists

autoRedirectDescription.title: auto_redirect_description
autoRedirectDescription.description: Text to describe that auto-redirect should happen after successful login

redirectedDescription.title: redirected_description
redirectedDescription.description: Text to describe that the window can be closed after redirect

sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description:
creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made

 on read: the timestamp of the first event of the object

 on create: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization an object belongs to

userLoginMustBeDomain.title: user_login_must_be_domain
userLoginMustBeDomain.description: the username has to end with the domain of its organization (uniqueness is organization based)

email.title: email
email.description: TODO: check if no value is allowed

phone.title: phone
phone.description: has to be a global number
